response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with over 15 years of development experience, including staff-level roles. He matches the primary stack closely with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside strong secondary skills in Java and cloud infrastructure. His recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and strong background in TDD make him an exceptional fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer role.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Demonstrated experience with AI-agent development and MCP code generators in his current Staff Engineer role.
Strong advocacy for software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and building custom testing frameworks.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or modern testing tools like Vitest, though his deep Node.js and TDD background mitigates this.
Significant past focus on DLang and Ember.js, which are outside the core target stack.
Lacks explicit mention of PostgreSQL, though he has solid experience with MongoDB and MySQL.
